metadata.description: Terraform/OpenTofu specialist for AWS, Azure, GCP, and modern platforms (Vercel, Railway, Render, Supabase, Upstash). Covers IaC authoring, module design, remote state, CI/CD pipelines, and full-stack environment wiring.
